title: cyanthillium wollastonii
intro: Cyanthillium wollastonii, also known as Wollaston's copperleaf, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant has been found to have potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. Cyanthillium wollastonii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies as a poultice or salve to treat various ailments.
